nasb.text: God made the beasts of the earth after their kind, and the cattle after their kind, and everything that creeps on the ground after its kind; and God saw that it was good.

esv.text: And God made the beasts of the earth according to their kinds and the livestock according to their kinds, and everything that creeps on the ground according to its kind. And God saw that it was good.

cnv.text: 於是，　神造了地上的野獸，各從其類；牲畜，各從其類；地上各種爬行的動物，各從其類。　神看這是好的。

ccb.text: 上帝造了各类的野兽、牲畜和爬虫。上帝看了，感到满意。

csbs.text: 于是神造了地上的野兽，各从其类；又造牲畜，各从其类；并地上一切的爬行之物，各从其类。神看这是好的。
